title: Anime bride
description: 🌸 Find your ultimate anime companion waiting under the cherry blossoms! Tame her with petals, watch her dance to music discs, and get delicious fresh cakes—just don't break her heart! 🍰✨
body:
![Anime bride](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d0947b729c325a3b132c14274e1644dd1550fd.png)
# 🌸 Anime Bride by Anoosh 🌸

Tired of exploring the infinite blocks of Minecraft all alone? Your singleplayer days just got a lot more interesting! **Anime Bride by Anoosh** introduces a charming, friendly companion to your world. She’s elegant, helpful, and currently waiting for her heroic knight to arrive.

---

## 💕 Features

* **🌸 Cherry Grove Romance:** She spawns exclusively in the beautiful **Cherry Grove** biome, patiently waiting under the cherry blossoms for a traveler to find her.
* **💐 Win Her Heart:** Want to make her your loyal companion? Skip the diamonds! Just offer her some **Pink Petals** or a **Cherry Sapling**, and she will happily join you on your adventures.
* **🎂 Expert Baker:** She loves baking sweet treats! Simply give her a **Milk Bucket**, and she will use her talents to bake you a delicious cake.
* **💃 Groove to the Music:** She loves a good melody! If you play any **Music Disc** nearby, she will vibe along and show off her custom dancing animations.
* **💔 Handle with Care:** Never lift a hand against her! If she takes damage from you, she won't fight back—she will get deeply upset and run away forever. Treat your companion with kindness!

---

## 🛠️ Installation & Support
1. Download and install the required library mod (see below).
2. Download the correct version of **Anime Bride by Anoosh** for your Mod Loader (Forge/Fabric/NeoForge).
3. Drop both `.jar` files into your Minecraft `mods` folder.
4. Grab some pink petals, and head out to the nearest Cherry Grove!

---

## ⛔ Requirements (🚨 REQUIRED DEPENDENCY 🚨)

To ensure her custom models and dancing animations render perfectly without any crashes, you **MUST** install the following mod:

* **[GeckoLib on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)**
* **[GeckoLib on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)**

*Note: Please ensure you download the version of GeckoLib that exactly matches your game version and mod loader!*
